name: Happy Ending Romance
overview: Jung-woo, unfairly ostracized from the literary world, finds refuge with Jung-hyun, a respected senior. Years later, their codependent lifestyle is disrupted by Tae-young, a young publisher seeking to publish Jung-woo's comeback novel.

trailers.title: Happy Ending Romance | Official Trailer | Watch 3 K-Pop stars' entangled love story on Nov. 24!
